evals.prompt: Our NestJS API's p95 latency is 800ms, target is 200ms. The main endpoint joins 3 tables, does a full-text search, and returns paginated results. Profile and optimize.
evals.expected_output: Profiling approach, query optimization, index recommendations, caching strategy, and expected improvement

assertions.name: query_profiling
assertions.description: Uses EXPLAIN ANALYZE to profile the slow query

assertions.name: index_recommendations
assertions.description: Suggests specific indexes for the join and search columns

assertions.name: query_rewrite
assertions.description: Suggests query optimizations (covering index, materialized view, or denormalization)

assertions.name: caching_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends Redis caching with appropriate TTL

assertions.name: expected_improvement
assertions.description: Estimates latency improvement from each optimization

evals.prompt: Our React app's bundle is 2.1MB. Lighthouse performance score is 45. Identify what's making it large and how to get it under 500KB.
evals.expected_output: Bundle analysis, code splitting recommendations, lazy loading, and tree shaking fixes

assertions.name: bundle_analysis
assertions.description: Identifies largest packages in the bundle

assertions.name: code_splitting
assertions.description: Recommends route-based or component-based code splitting

assertions.name: lazy_loading
assertions.description: Suggests React.lazy for non-critical routes

assertions.name: tree_shaking
assertions.description: Identifies packages preventing tree shaking

assertions.name: target_achievable
assertions.description: Shows path from 2.1MB to under 500KB

evals.prompt: Our Flutter app is janky — frames are being dropped on the product list screen when scrolling. The list has 500+ items with images.
evals.expected_output: Flutter performance fixes: ListView.builder, image caching, const widgets, and profiling approach

assertions.name: listview_builder
assertions.description: Recommends ListView.builder instead of ListView with children

assertions.name: image_caching
assertions.description: Suggests cached_network_image or equivalent for image loading

assertions.name: const_widgets
assertions.description: Recommends const constructors for stateless widgets

assertions.name: profiling
assertions.description: Shows how to use Flutter DevTools to identify jank

assertions.name: pagination
assertions.description: Recommends pagination or lazy loading instead of loading all 500 items

evals.prompt: Our PostgreSQL database is using 95% of available connections (90/95 max). API requests are starting to fail with 'too many connections'. We run 3 NestJS services + 2 Celery workers.
evals.expected_output: Connection pool sizing, PgBouncer recommendation, per-service pool limits, and monitoring

assertions.name: connection_audit
assertions.description: Calculates total connections used by all services and workers

assertions.name: pgbouncer
assertions.description: Recommends PgBouncer for connection pooling

assertions.name: per_service_limits
assertions.description: Sets pool size per service to stay under max_connections

assertions.name: max_connections_increase
assertions.description: Evaluates whether to increase max_connections or add pooler

assertions.name: monitoring
assertions.description: Recommends connection count monitoring and alerting

evals.prompt: Our Django API has N+1 query problems. The /api/orders/ endpoint runs 1 query for orders + 1 per order for customer + 1 per order for items. With 100 orders that's 201 queries.
evals.expected_output: N+1 detection, select_related/prefetch_related fix, query count verification

assertions.name: n_plus_1_detected
assertions.description: Identifies the specific N+1 pattern

assertions.name: select_related
assertions.description: Uses select_related for ForeignKey (customer)

assertions.name: prefetch_related
assertions.description: Uses prefetch_related for reverse FK (items)

assertions.name: query_count_before_after
assertions.description: Shows query count going from 201 to 2-3

assertions.name: test_assertion
assertions.description: Shows how to assert query count in tests
